Job Description:

About 3M Home Water Solutions

At 3M, we apply science in collaborative ways to improve lives and create what’s next. Our Home Water Solutions portfolio includes fully automatic water softeners, whole-house water filters, water treatment systems, and advanced drinking water systems. We help households safeguard water quality and protect appliances, delivering trust in every drop—from entry to point of use.

Role Summary

The Area Sales Executive will drive sales growth for 3M Home Water Solutions in the assigned Gujarat territory. This role involves managing distributor relationships, expanding channel presence, driving secondary sales, ensuring financial hygiene, and executing BTL and community engagement activities to achieve business objectives.

Key Responsibilities

Sales & Channel Management

  • Achieve overall sales targets for the assigned territory (primary & secondary).
  • Build and maintain strong relationships with existing distributors to ensure alignment with 3M business goals.
  • Identify, recruit, and onboard high-potential new distribution partners to expand market reach.
  • Train distributor sales teams on product features, value propositions, and sales tools.
  • Collaborate with marketing and service teams to support business priorities.

Sales Operations & Secondary Sales

  • Drive secondary sales by implementing and supervising frontline sales infrastructure.
  • Ensure smooth product movement from distributors to end customers through sell-out initiatives.
  • Manage Accounts Receivable (AR), ensuring timely collections and adherence to financial hygiene norms.
  • Build accurate monthly/quarterly/annual forecasts and Operational Plans using data-driven insights.
  • Execute category-wise strategies to meet individual product line growth targets.
  • Maintain a healthy opportunity pipeline on Salesforce (SFDC), from lead generation to closure.

Market Development

  • Plan and execute BTL activities, including demand generation programs, merchandising, and in-store visibility.
  • Drive community and institutional sales by engaging RWAs, housing societies, builders, and institutional buyers.
  • Penetrate retail segments such as kitchen and bath dealers and influence key opinion leaders (architects, interior designers, MEP consultants, etc.).

Required Skills

  • Strong technical understanding of water treatment or home appliance systems
  • Good communication & interpersonal skills
  • Results-oriented and self-driven
  • Strong channel management & sales operations capability
  • Experience with pipeline management and CRM tools (preferably SFDC)

Preferred Skills

  • Experience managing key accounts
  • Distributor onboarding & capability-building
  • Ability to lead cross-functional initiatives
  • Analytical mindset with data-driven decision-making

Education Qualifications

  • Graduate (Any discipline)
    Preferred: MBA in Sales, Marketing, or relevant field

Experience Required

5–10 years of experience in:
  • Consumer appliances
  • Consumer durables
  • Water treatment industry
  • Sanitaryware
  • QSR / Food Service equipment segment
  • Or similar category with field sales & channel management

Key Competencies

  • Customer orientation
  • Negotiation & influencing skills
  • Planning & execution excellence
  • Relationship management
  • Territory management
  • Problem-solving & analytical thinking

Industry Background

Candidates from Water Purification Systems, Water Treatment, Consumer Durables, Sanitaryware, Home Appliances, or Building Materials sectors preferred.

Learn more about 3M’s creative solutions to the world’s problems at www.3M.com or on Instagram, Facebook, and LinkedIn @3M.

Safety is a core value at 3M. All employees are expected to contribute to a strong Environmental Health and Safety (EHS) culture by following safety policies, identifying hazards, and engaging in continuous improvement.

About 3M Transportation Safety

For over 80 years, 3M’s Transportation Safety has been pioneering innovative technologies that enhance road safety and traffic management. In India, this division is one of the largest and fastest-growing, recognized as a preferred partner in key infrastructure projects.

From reflective sheeting for traffic signs to advanced solutions for vehicles and road markings, 3M continues to transform road safety through science, helping ensure every road user reaches their destination safely and efficiently.

Position Overview

This role is responsible for driving business development in NHAI for Transportation Safety across the North India region. The selected individual will champion road safety solutions, engage with NHAI stakeholders (consultants, contractors, department) and contribute to the division’s continued growth in India.

Key Responsibilities

  • Lead end-to-end NHAI business development and relationship management

  • Build strong engagement with NHAI, consultants, and major contractors.

  • Identify customer challenges, analyze needs, and deliver tailored solutions that align with 3M’s safety goals.

  • Conduct product demonstrations, seminars, and awareness programs to promote road safety and demonstrate product differentiation.

  • Ensure 3M product specifications are incorporated in relevant government tenders and project documents.

  • Identify new business segments, introduce new products, and explore untapped market opportunities.

  • Use CRM and sales automation tools to maintain an active sales pipeline and manage opportunities effectively.

  • Develop forecasts, execute marketing initiatives, and achieve assigned targets on a monthly and annual basis

  • Collaborate with internal cross-functional teams to ensure exceptional customer service and complaint resolution.

Qualifications

  • B.E. / MBA with a proven track record in B2B or institutional sales.

  • Minimum of 5 years of core sales experience, preferably in infrastructure, industrial, or government sector sales.

  • Familiarity with government departments and procedures (e.g., PWD, NHAI, Municipal Corporations, Smart Cities).

  • Experience in infrastructure project sales, concept selling, seminar facilitation, and specification-based sales.

  • Experience influencing tender generation and working on long-cycle sales engagements.


Preferred Attributes

  • Strong communication and stakeholder engagement skills.

  • Solution-oriented, self-driven, and proactive.

  • Comfortable with data-driven decision-making and CRM tools.

  • Demonstrated growth mindset and ability to work both independently and collaboratively.

Job Description:

Job Summary

3M is seeking an experienced Sales / Business Development Manager to drive market penetration and revenue growth for the Electrical Cable Accessories portfolio in the Construction & Industrial (C&I) segment. The role involves strategic engagement with end users, engineering consultants, EPC contractors, and key industrial accounts to drive product approvals, technology adoption, and sales growth across India.

Key Responsibilities

Sales & Business Development

  • Drive penetration and market share growth in the Construction & Industrial segment.

  • Achieve assigned sales targets and revenue quotas.

  • Develop and execute territory and account growth strategies.

  • Identify and develop new business opportunities across defined verticals.

Key Account Management

  • Build and manage relationships with:

    • End Users

    • Engineering Consultants

    • Electrical Contractors

    • EPC (Engineering Procurement Construction) Companies

  • Develop strategic account plans for key accounts across India.

  • Increase wallet share within existing accounts.

Product Approval & Technical Engagement

  • Drive product approvals and specification inclusion with consultants and end users.

  • Support trials, technical demonstrations, and proof-of-concept initiatives.

  • Work closely with Application Engineering and Technical Teams for solution selling.

Pipeline & CRM Management

  • Manage sales funnel using CRM tools.

  • Maintain accurate forecasting and opportunity tracking.

  • Ensure timely reporting and pipeline hygiene.

Cross-Functional Collaboration

  • Partner with Sales, Marketing, and Application Engineering teams.

  • Support new product launches and technology adoption initiatives.

  • Operate effectively in a matrix organization.

Required Qualifications

  • Bachelor’s Degree in Electrical Engineering (mandatory).

  • Minimum 10 years of Sales / Business Development experience.

  • Proven experience in Construction and Industrial market segments.

  • Experience in CRM systems and pipeline management.

  • Strong techno-commercial acumen.

  • Willingness to travel up to 50%.

Preferred Candidates:

  • Industry exposure in:

    • Power Generation

    • Metals & Mining

    • Oil & Gas / Petrochemicals

    • Rail & Metro

    • Airports

    • Data Centers

    • Renewable Energy (Solar & Wind)

  • Knowledge of:

    • Electrical Cable Accessories

    • Product approval processes with consultants and end users

    • Large key account management

    • Channel partner management

    • Matrix organization structures

Learn more about 3M’s creative solutions to the world’s problems at www.3M.com or on Instagram, Facebook, and LinkedIn @3M.

Safety is a core value at 3M. All employees are expected to contribute to a strong Environmental Health and Safety (EHS) culture by following safety policies, identifying hazards, and engaging in continuous improvement.

Please note: your application may not be considered if you do not provide your education and work history, either by: 1) uploading a resume, or 2) entering the information into the application fields directly.
